meta_title: For Founders: idea validation to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to idea validation and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Idea Validation to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop guessing. Learn how to validate SaaS ideas to overcome project paralysis. An expert-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid deployment.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for the 'perfect' idea. Instead, map micro-pain points in underserved niches using automated search analysis. Validate by building a high-fidelity landing page that captures intent before writing core logic. Focus on revenue signals, not just user interest, to ensure your SaaS solves a high-value business problem.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a code editor is the graveyard of a thousand ambition-filled startups. You have the technical stack, the compute power, and the drive, yet you sit paralyzed, waiting for a lightning bolt of inspiration that never strikes. This isn't a lack of creativity; it is a failure of your discovery framework.

True founders don't wait for 'ideas.' They hunt for friction. By pivoting your focus from 'building apps' to 'solving high-value business headaches,' you transform from a coder into a product architect. We will use Antigravity to scrape market sentiment and Claude Code to execute rapid validation experiments, turning your technical prowess into a revenue-generating asset.

steps.title: Automated Niche Discovery
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scrape subreddits and forums for 'how do I' or 'I hate when' keywords to find genuine pain points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan r/SaaS and r/startups for recurring complaints regarding manual data tasks or inefficient B2B workflows. Identify 3 distinct niches with high frustration levels.

steps.title: Competitor Gap Analysis
steps.description: Analyze existing market leaders to find features they ignore or execute poorly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the feature sets of top 3 competitors in the identified niche. Highlight areas where users complain about feature bloat or lack of specific automation.

steps.title: Value Proposition Engineering
steps.description: Draft a landing page copy that speaks directly to the pain point identified, focusing on ROI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a high-converting landing page structure for a SaaS that solves [identified_problem]. Focus on business outcomes, not features.

steps.title: Rapid MVP Simulation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to build a functional prototype that solves exactly one core aspect of the problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scaffold for a Python-based tool that automates [specific_task]. Ensure the code is production-ready and modular.

steps.title: Intent Capture Deployment
steps.description: Deploy the landing page and set up a waitlist to measure real-world interest before full-scale development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment script for Vercel that integrates a waitlist capture form with a CRM hook.

pro_tips: Never build until you have at least 10 people on a waitlist who have confirmed they are willing to pay for a solution.
Ignore 'nice to have' features; your MVP should be a 'must-have' painkiller, not a vitamin.
Use Claude Code to automate your testing suite; if you aren't testing, you are just writing technical debt.
The best ideas come from your own professional background—look at the tools you use daily and find what you hate about them.
Optimize for 'Time to First Value'—if a user can't experience the core benefit in under 60 seconds, your UX is failing.
content.next_steps: Once your waitlist reaches 50+ signups, transition from static landing page to a functional Beta using the scaffold you built in step 4.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the framework, and the technical edge. The only variable left is your execution. Stop theorizing and start shipping. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
